query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 0 THEN CAST(total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE CAST(bad_debt AS DECIMAL(18,2)) END) AS total_paid_new,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 0 THEN 
    CAST(principal AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + CAST(interest AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + CAST(fee AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + 
    CAST(penalty AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + CAST(unlock_fee AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + CAST(overpaid AS DECIMAL(18,2))
    - CAST(discount AS DECIMAL(18,2))
  ELSE 0 END) AS sum_breakdown_minus_discount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 1 THEN CAST(bad_debt AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS device_sale,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 0 THEN 
    CAST(principal AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + CAST(interest AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + CAST(fee AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + 
    CAST(penalty AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + CAST(unlock_fee AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + CAST(overpaid AS DECIMAL(18,2))
    - CAST(discount AS DECIMAL(18,2))
  ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 1 THEN CAST(bad_debt AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS ui_total
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'

SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 0 THEN CAST(total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE CAST(bad_debt AS DECIMAL(18,2)) END) AS total_paid_new,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 0 THEN 
    CAST(principal AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + CAST(interest AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + CAST(fee AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + 
    CAST(penalty AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + CAST(unlock_fee AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + CAST(overpaid AS DECIMAL(18,2))
    - CAST(discount AS DECIMAL(18,2))
  ELSE 0 END) AS sum_breakdown_minus_discount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 1 THEN CAST(bad_debt AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS device_sale,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 0 THEN 
    CAST(principal AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + CAST(interest AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + CAST(fee AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + 
    CAST(penalty AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + CAST(unlock_fee AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + CAST(overpaid AS DECIMAL(18,2))
    - CAST(discount AS DECIMAL(18,2))
  ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 1 THEN CAST(bad_debt AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS ui_total
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
